name: multiplayer-racer
description: A multiplayer racing game with physics

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:server
scripts.test:server: bash -lc 'if [ -f ~/.pyenv/versions/multiplayer-racer/bin/activate ]; then source ~/.pyenv/versions/multiplayer-racer/bin/activate; fi; python -m unittest server.test_socket_routing'
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:server
